summary: Iteration 5 testing completed successfully. All features verified: 1) Tab Anagrafica with extended fields (NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN, indirizzo completo), 2) Modifica dati cliente functionality, 3) Archiviazione cliente, 4) Gestione Liste page with list creation/management, 5) Add/remove clients from lists, 6) Send notification to list, 7) Caricamento Globale tab with AI batch upload. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ API Health Check - Fiscal Tax Canarie API accessible
✅ Commercialista Login - Authentication working with correct credentials
✅ GET /api/clients - Returns extended fields (NIE, NIF, CIF, tipo_cliente)
✅ PUT /api/clients/{id} - Update client with extended fields (NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN, indirizzo, etc.)
✅ PUT /api/clients/{id} - Update tipo_cliente (autonomo/societa/privato)
✅ DELETE /api/clients/{id}?permanent=false - Archive client (stato = cessato)
✅ GET /api/client-lists - Returns all client lists with client_count
✅ POST /api/client-lists - Create new client list
✅ POST /api/client-lists/{list_id}/clients/{client_id} - Add client to list
✅ DELETE /api/client-lists/{list_id}/clients/{client_id} - Remove client from list
✅ POST /api/client-lists/{list_id}/send-notification - Send notification to list
✅ POST /api/documents/upload-batch - Batch upload endpoint exists
✅ POST /api/documents/upload-batch - Batch upload with test files works
✅ DELETE /api/client-lists/{id} - Delete client list
✅ Frontend: Tab Anagrafica - All fields visible (NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN, indirizzo, città, CAP, provincia)
✅ Frontend: Tab Anagrafica - Edit mode (Modifica button) enables field editing
✅ Frontend: Tab Anagrafica - Save changes works ('Dati cliente aggiornati' toast)
✅ Frontend: Tab Anagrafica - Zona Pericolosa with Archivia and Elimina buttons
✅ Frontend: Gestione Liste page - Lists tab shows existing lists (Autonomi, Società)
✅ Frontend: Gestione Liste - Create new list form (Nome, Descrizione, Colore)
✅ Frontend: Gestione Liste - Notifica button on each list
✅ Frontend: Caricamento Globale tab - Upload area for batch AI upload
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data, updated Cliente Test 158823 with NIE and NIF values
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features tested and working. Tab Anagrafica in ClientDetail shows all extended fields (NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN, full address). Edit mode enables all fields. Archive/Delete in Zona Pericolosa. Gestione Liste page at /admin/lists has two tabs: Liste Clienti (create lists, add clients, send notifications) and Caricamento Globale (AI batch upload). Lists 'Autonomi' and 'Società' already exist. Upload-batch API tested with mock PDF files.

sections: Dati Personali: Nome Completo, Email, Telefono
Identificazione Fiscale: NIE (Stranieri), NIF (Persone fisiche), CIF (Società), Codice Fiscale IT
Classificazione: Tipo Cliente, Regime Fiscale, Tipo Attività, Stato
Zona Pericolosa: Archivia Cliente, Elimina Permanentemente
anagrafica_tab.edit_mode: Modifica button enables editing, Salva Modifiche saves changes

features: View existing lists with client count
Send notification to all clients in list
